raw_input.title: Staff Software Engineer, Simulation
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Staff Software Engineer in autonomous vehicle simulation. Own simulation ecosystem, scalable tools, workflows, scenario libraries, testing and validation pipelines for autonomous driving technology. 7+ years and in-person/relocation risk near Sunnyvale or Mountain View.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer with 4+ years. No autonomous driving, simulation platform, Staff-level, or California relocation profile.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: Staff + autonomous driving simulation + relocation/in-person risk is a double/triple mismatch.
